default.title: An error occurred
default.description: We could not complete your request.

400.title: The request is invalid
400.description: Some submitted information is missing, invalid or expired.

403.title: You cannot access this page
403.description: Your account does not have the required permissions to perform this action.

404.title: This page does not exist
404.description: The address is incorrect or the resource has been moved.

429.title: Please wait a moment
429.description: Too many requests were submitted. Try again in a few minutes.

500.title: An internal error occurred
500.description: The server could not complete this operation. The current transaction was rolled back.

messages.registration_conflict: The account could not be created because some information already exists.
messages.registration_failed: An error occurred while creating the account.

oauth.not_configured: This sign-in method will be configured soon.
